title: Marvel Super Special
content:
{{Top|rwm|italics=1}}
'''''Marvel Super Special''''' is a comic series which was used by [[Marvel Comics]] in the 1970s and 1980s as their showcase title for their comic adaptations of movies and pop culture icons.

==Media==
===Issues===
*[[Marvel Super Special 16|''Marvel Super Special 16: The Empire Strikes Back'']]
*[[Marvel Super Special 27|''Marvel Super Special 27: Return of the Jedi'']]
